## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if any). List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Build / Dependency update

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.
- [ ] Compiled locally using `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Tested tap-to-speak behavior
- [ ] Tested hold-to-speak behavior
- [ ] Tested security config (saving API key)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the Kotlin coding conventions of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or compiler errors
- [ ] Any temporary files created (e.g. recordings) are safely deleted
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable)
